subject: Move back to https for SO VNFM adapter
commit_message:
Move back to https for SO VNFM adapter

Issue-ID: SO-3046
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Iad65a987d9e4cbeee368fa50bbc109c037611997

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.
